notes: The response is thorough on operational detail and risk narrative but fails across nearly every structured dimension: it presents the problem partially solution-framed (opportunity summary leads with the proposed pipeline), personas are generic role labels without timing or cost-per-persona, there is no bounded MVP with explicit deferrals (only a broad in-scope process list), out-of-scope items lack reasons, assumptions are discovery questions rather than genuine uncertainties with stated risk-if-wrong, success metrics lack baseline anchoring to the stated 6–8 day / 1 missed deadline baseline, and the four hard regulatory constraints (RBNZ deadline, FMA audit trail, human sign-off, normalisation disclosure requirement) are noted qualitatively but never captured as sourced hard constraints.
